chain.sourceAction: Run local secret replacement packet after operator values exist.
prerequisites: GF-001..GF-016 provider/runtime values have been created outside git.
Local secret scaffold exists under the configured secure local secret directory.
evidenceRequired: 45_secret_replacement_packet.md lists every runtime and attestation secret without values.
Local secret files check reports every runtime secret READY and at least one attestation option READY.

chain.sourceAction: Generate hosted staging attestation packet from real evidence only.
prerequisites: Hosted staging evidence packet exists and contains sanitized provider/runtime proof.
No local-only command output is treated as hosted proof.
evidenceRequired: Attestation references live hosted evidence for DB, observability, email, AI cap, and smoke checks.

chain.sourceAction: Encode validated attestation as the preferred B64 secret.
prerequisites: GF-018 validated the hosted attestation packet.
Operator chose one attestation secret strategy: B64 preferred or JSON alternative.
evidenceRequired: 46_attestation_secret_pack.md reports READY without printing the packet value.
At least one attestation local secret file is READY.

chain.sourceAction: Upload local secret pack to GitHub Actions after validation.
prerequisites: GF-017 local runtime secrets are READY.
GitHub CLI is authenticated for the target repository.
evidenceRequired: 40_missing_github_secrets_remediation.md reports READY or no missing runtime/attestation secrets.

prerequisites: GF-021 confirms GitHub secret names are present.
GateForge Hosted Staging Strict workflow exists and is dispatchable.
evidenceRequired: 41_hosted_strict_trigger_attempt.md reports TRIGGERED or dry-run readiness in smoke.
Hosted Staging Strict GitHub workflow completes successfully with sanitized artifact upload.
